title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SIDBI Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SIDBI Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Gwalior. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SIDBI Ventures Solutions:
SIDBI Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
